title: Collapse duplicate planning checker payload copies
goal: Implement #540 by making one package-owned planning surface checker the authoritative source.
Keep stable command paths as thin compatibility wrappers or generated payload only when a real consumer needs them.
non_goals: Do not remove the root scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py command path.
Do not add a new command or host-specific workflow dependency.
Do not broaden this slice into unrelated planning-state or structured-file schema work.

intent.outcome: duplicate checker implementations collapse to one maintained source plus verified compatibility surfaces
intent.constraints: repo/tool/language agnostic; preserve weak-agent/bootstrap consumers; prefer deletion or thin wrappers over duplicated payload
intent.latitude: may update checker source, wrappers, installer payload routing, payload classifications, tests, and planning state
intent.escalation: stop if a stable consumer requires multiple full implementations rather than a generated or wrapper surface

execution.next_step: archive this plan, close #540, and clear the completed parent lane from active planning state
execution.proof: passed: planning checker, planning doctor, package tests, workspace tests, maintainer surfaces, and ruff

invariants: root checker command remains runnable from source checkouts
installed/bootstrap paths do not retain stale full implementations
newer active.execplans and work_items state-shape support is preserved

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: stop checking in reconstructable artifact residue

required_continuation.activation trigger: new duplicate generated payload copies or checker drift

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: preserve both source-checkout and bootstrap/install consumers
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: whether each non-canonical path should be removed or kept as a thin wrapper
delegated_judgment.escalate when: a consumer cannot run without a full duplicated checker body

iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Deleting the root-installed checker mirror exposed an implicit maintainer-checker consumer, so the consumer path was converted to load the package-owned checker and boundary tests now prevent full-body duplicate reintroduction.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: The root wrapper executes the package-owned checker, bootstrap/root-installed duplicate checker bodies are gone, maintainer surfaces still run, and source-payload tests guard the single-source shape.

references.label: collapse duplicate planning checker payload copies

active_milestone.scope: planning checker source, payload mirrors, and parity checks

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed plan and close #540.
invariants: One full checker implementation is maintained.
Compatibility paths stay thin and checked.
Package surfaces stay implementation independent where shipped.
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Canonical checker source is identified and contains the freshest state-shape support.
Non-canonical checked-in checker paths are removed or reduced to thin compatibility wrappers.
Tests or checks fail on future full-body duplicate checker copies.
#540 is closed and the parent reconstructable-artifact-policy lane has no remaining child issues.

signals found: The package did not list reverse consumers for a soon-to-be-deleted mirror up front; `make maintainer-surfaces` caught the break after the edit.
signals fixed: Maintainer checks now load the package-owned checker source instead of a removed mirror.
Source-payload boundary tests now reject duplicate full-body planning checker copies.
signals dismissed: No new issue: the actionable consumer-discovery gap was closed inside this slice with existing checks rather than a new feature.

execution_run.what happened: Promoted the freshest planning checker logic into packages/planning/scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py, reduced the root command path to a wrapper, removed stale bootstrap/root-installed full-body mirrors, and updated maintainer/boundary checks.
execution_run.scope touched: planning checker source, compatibility wrappers, maintainer checker routing, payload classification metadata, and focused tests
execution_run.changed surfaces: single-source checker authority moved to the planning package source tree
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py tests/test_packaging.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_source_payload_operational_install.py tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests scripts; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; make maintainer-surfaces
execution_run.result for continuation: #540 complete; reconstructable-artifact-policy has no remaining child issue.
execution_run.next step: archive plan, close #540, commit, and push
